title: Add progress indicator to onboarding wizard
description: Users need to see how many steps remain in the onboarding flow. Currently there is no visual indicator of progress.

title: Reduce onboarding template page load time
description: The template selection page takes over 3 seconds to load because all template metadata is fetched upfront. Investigate lazy loading.

title: Implement automated re-engagement emails
description: Send follow-up emails to users who started signup but did not complete onboarding within 48 hours.
